---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Use case
<!-- What are you trying to do that m5-infer doesn't do today, or does badly? Be specific — "make it faster" is harder to act on than "decode tok/s drops 3× when running 4 parallel sessions". -->

## Proposed solution
<!-- If you have an idea of how it could work, describe it. Link to papers / other engines that do this if relevant. -->

## Alternatives considered
<!-- Other workarounds you tried or considered. -->

## Impact
<!-- Who benefits, and roughly how much. Concrete numbers (tok/s, latency, accuracy) beat subjective ones. -->

## Related
<!-- Link to the ROADMAP.md section if your idea fits into an existing phase. Link to related issues / discussions. -->
